applicability.notes: Frequent Inspection per Section 8.2.3. Performed at intervals from daily to monthly, depending on equipment usage. Required before each use or shift for heavy-use equipment.

wear_level.label: Minor - Light wear, no action needed
Requires Replacement - Replace before next inspection

fields.label: Inspection Interval
fields.help_text: Select the maintenance schedule interval for this equipment

fields.label: Equipment Hour Meter Reading
fields.help_text: Record current hour meter reading

fields.label: Equipment Location
fields.help_text: Where equipment is currently located or assigned

fields.label: Operating manual reviewed for inspection requirements
fields.help_text: Verify you understand manufacturer's specific inspection requirements

fields.label: Previous inspection records reviewed
fields.help_text: Check for any ongoing issues or recent repairs

fields.label: Any modifications or repairs since last inspection reviewed
fields.help_text: Verify all modifications are documented and approved

guidance: Test all operating controls from both ground and platform positions where applicable
Controls should operate smoothly without binding, hesitation, or excessive play
Check that each control returns to neutral position when released
Verify control labels are legible and correct
Document any controls that are inoperative, binding, reversed, or not functioning properly
Test boom raise/lower from both ground and platform controls
Test boom extend/retract controls
Test boom rotation (swing) controls
Test platform rotation controls if equipped
Test platform leveling controls if equipped
Test outrigger/stabilizer deployment and retraction controls
Test engine controls (start, stop, throttle)

fields.label: Boom Raise/Lower Controls (Ground)
fields.help_text: Test from ground control station

fields.label: Boom Raise/Lower Controls (Platform)
fields.help_text: Test from platform control station

fields.label: Boom Extend/Retract Controls
fields.help_text: Test extension and retraction from both positions

fields.label: Boom Rotation (Swing) Controls
fields.help_text: Test rotation left and right

fields.label: Platform Rotation Controls (if equipped)
fields.help_text: Test platform rotation if unit is equipped

fields.label: Platform Leveling Controls (if equipped)
fields.help_text: Test automatic or manual leveling system

fields.label: Outrigger/Stabilizer Controls
fields.help_text: Test deployment and retraction of all outriggers

fields.label: Engine Controls (Start/Stop/Throttle)
fields.help_text: Test all engine control functions

fields.label: All controls operate smoothly without binding
fields.help_text: No sticking, binding, or excessive play

fields.label: All controls return to neutral when released
fields.help_text: Spring-return controls center properly

fields.label: Control labels are present and legible
fields.help_text: All control functions clearly labeled

fields.label: Operating Controls Notes
fields.help_text: Document any issues or observations

defect.title: Operating control defect found during frequent inspection
defect.description: Operating control malfunction detected. Equipment must not be operated until repairs are completed and verified.

guidance: Test all emergency stop buttons (ground and platform)
Verify E-stop immediately halts all boom functions
Test ground override/emergency descent controls
Test manual lowering system if equipped
Verify emergency controls are clearly marked and accessible
All emergency controls must function properly - this is critical for safety
Document any emergency control that fails to operate correctly

fields.label: Emergency Stop (E-Stop) - Ground Controls
fields.help_text: E-stop must immediately halt all functions

fields.label: Emergency Stop (E-Stop) - Platform Controls
fields.help_text: Platform E-stop must immediately halt all functions

fields.label: Ground Override/Emergency Descent Controls
fields.help_text: Ground controls override platform controls when activated

fields.label: Manual Lowering System (if equipped)
fields.help_text: Test manual/auxiliary lowering system operation

fields.label: Emergency controls clearly marked and accessible
fields.help_text: Red E-stop buttons clearly visible and labeled

fields.label: Emergency Controls Notes
fields.help_text: Document any issues or observations

defect.title: CRITICAL: Emergency control defect found
defect.description: Emergency control malfunction detected. Equipment must be tagged OUT OF SERVICE immediately until repairs are completed and verified.

guidance: Test boom angle indicator/warning device - verify accurate reading
Test load/capacity warning system - should activate at rated capacity
Test outrigger interlock system - prevents operation unless outriggers deployed
Check platform gates close and latch properly
Test travel alarm/warning device
Test tilt/level sensor if equipped
All safety devices must function properly
Document any safety device that is inoperative, damaged, or out of calibration

fields.label: Boom Angle Indicator/Warning Device
fields.help_text: Indicator shows accurate boom angle

fields.label: Load/Capacity Warning Indicator
fields.help_text: Warning activates at rated capacity limit

fields.label: Outrigger/Stabilizer Interlock System
fields.help_text: Prevents operation unless outriggers properly deployed

fields.label: Travel Alarm/Warning Device
fields.help_text: Audible alarm during travel or boom movement

fields.label: Platform Entry Gates/Chains
fields.help_text: Gates close and latch securely

fields.label: Tilt/Level Sensor (if equipped)
fields.help_text: Sensor detects and warns of excessive tilt

fields.label: Platform Overload Sensor (if equipped)
fields.help_text: Sensor detects overload condition in platform

fields.label: Motion Alarm (if equipped)
fields.help_text: Alarm sounds during boom movement

fields.label: Safety Devices Notes
fields.help_text: Document any issues or observations

defect.title: Safety device defect found during frequent inspection
defect.description: Safety device malfunction detected. Equipment must be tagged OUT OF SERVICE until repairs are completed and verified.

guidance: Visually inspect boom structure for cracks, bends, deformation, or damage
Check critical welds for visible cracks or signs of failure
Check pivot pins are secure and show no excessive wear
Check for loose or missing bolts/fasteners
Check platform floor, railings, and gates for damage
Check turret bearing for smooth rotation
Check outrigger pads and beams for damage or wear
Look for any structural damage, corrosion, or deterioration
Document location and severity of any defects found

fields.label: Boom Structure (all sections)
fields.help_text: No cracks, deformation, or structural damage

fields.label: Welds (visible inspection)
fields.help_text: No visible cracks or deterioration in welds

fields.label: Pivot Pins and Bushings
fields.help_text: Pins secure, no excessive wear or play

fields.label: Bolts and Fasteners
fields.help_text: No loose or missing bolts/fasteners

fields.label: Platform Floor
fields.help_text: Floor solid, no holes, damage, or excessive wear

fields.label: Platform Railings and Gates
fields.help_text: Railings secure, gates functional

fields.label: Turret Bearing
fields.help_text: Smooth rotation, no grinding or binding

fields.label: Turret Mounting to Pedestal
fields.help_text: Secure mounting, no cracks or looseness

fields.label: Pedestal Mounting to Chassis
fields.help_text: Critical mounting - check for cracks, loose bolts

fields.label: Outrigger Beams and Structure
fields.help_text: Beams straight, no cracks or damage

fields.label: Outrigger Pads
fields.help_text: Pads intact, no cracks or excessive wear

fields.label: Corrosion Check
fields.help_text: No excessive corrosion on structural components

fields.label: Structural Inspection Notes
fields.help_text: Document location and nature of any defects

fields.label: Defect Photos
fields.help_text: Upload photo(s) of any defects, damage, or wear found. Required for FAIL conditions and excessive wear. Strongly recommended for all issues.

defect.title: Structural defect found during frequent inspection
defect.description: Structural defect detected. Equipment must be tagged OUT OF SERVICE and evaluated by qualified personnel.

guidance: Check all hydraulic cylinders for leaks, damage, rod condition
Check cylinder mounting pins and hardware
Check all hydraulic hoses for leaks, cracks, chafing, or bulging
Check hose routing - no rubbing or interference
Check hydraulic fittings for leaks
Check hydraulic reservoir fluid level
Check for hydraulic fluid leaks on ground under unit
Check hydraulic filter condition if visible
Document any leaks, damaged hoses, or low fluid levels

fields.label: Hydraulic Cylinders (all)
fields.help_text: No leaks, rods not scored or damaged

fields.label: Cylinder Mounting Pins and Hardware
fields.help_text: Pins secure with retaining hardware in place

fields.label: Hydraulic Hoses (all visible)
fields.help_text: No leaks, cracks, chafing, bulging, or deterioration

fields.label: Hose Routing and Protection
fields.help_text: Hoses properly routed, no rubbing or pinching

fields.label: Hydraulic Fittings and Connections
fields.help_text: Fittings tight, no leaks at connections

fields.label: Hydraulic Reservoir Fluid Level
fields.help_text: Fluid level within normal range on sight gauge

fields.label: Hydraulic Fluid Condition
fields.help_text: Fluid not contaminated, milky, or discolored

fields.label: Hydraulic Filter (if visible)
fields.help_text: No bypass indicator, filter not clogged

fields.label: Ground Check - No Hydraulic Leaks Under Unit
fields.help_text: Check ground for signs of leaking fluid

fields.label: Hydraulic System Notes
fields.help_text: Document location and nature of any defects

fields.label: Defect Photos
fields.help_text: Upload photo(s) of any defects, damage, or wear found. Required for FAIL conditions and excessive wear. Strongly recommended for all issues.

defect.title: Hydraulic system defect found during frequent inspection
defect.description: Hydraulic system defect detected. Evaluate severity and repair as needed before continued operation.

guidance: Check for damaged wiring or insulation
Check for loose electrical connections
Check for corrosion on electrical components
Check battery condition and connections
Check for exposed wires or improper repairs
Document any electrical hazards or damage

fields.label: Wiring and Insulation
fields.help_text: No damaged insulation, exposed wires, or chafing

fields.label: Electrical Connections
fields.help_text: Connections tight and secure, no corrosion

fields.label: Battery Condition and Connections
fields.help_text: Battery secure, terminals clean and tight

fields.label: Control Panels and Displays
fields.help_text: Panels intact, displays functioning

fields.label: Work Lights and Warning Lights
fields.help_text: All lights functional when tested

fields.label: Electrical System Notes
fields.help_text: Document any issues or observations

fields.label: Defect Photos
fields.help_text: Upload photo(s) of any defects, damage, or wear found. Required for FAIL conditions and excessive wear. Strongly recommended for all issues.

defect.title: Electrical system defect found during frequent inspection
defect.description: Electrical system defect detected. Repair as needed before continued operation.

guidance: Verify capacity chart is present, legible, and matches equipment
Check operating instructions placard is present and legible
Verify all required warning labels are present and legible
Check manufacturer's serial plate is attached and legible
Verify current inspection decal is present with correct date
All markings and placards must be readable from operator positions

fields.label: Capacity Chart/Load Chart
fields.help_text: Chart present, legible, matches equipment configuration

fields.label: Operating Instructions Placard
fields.help_text: Instructions present and legible

fields.label: Warning Labels (all required)
fields.help_text: All warning labels present and legible

fields.label: Manufacturer's Serial Plate
fields.help_text: Serial plate securely attached and legible

fields.label: Current Inspection Decal
fields.help_text: Inspection decal current with correct date

fields.label: Control Function Labels
fields.help_text: All control functions clearly labeled

fields.label: Any marking or placard deficiencies found?
Markings and Placards Notes
fields.help_text: Document missing or illegible items

fields.label: Defect Photos
fields.help_text: Upload photo(s) of any defects, damage, or wear found. Required for FAIL conditions and excessive wear. Strongly recommended for all issues.

defect.title: Missing or illegible marking/placard found
defect.description: Required marking or placard is missing or illegible. Must be replaced before continued operation.

fields.label: All operating and emergency controls functional
No safety-critical issues found
fields.help_text: Any safety issues must be corrected before operation

fields.label: Equipment is safe for continued operation
fields.help_text: Check YES only if equipment passes all safety requirements

fields.label: Any operational restrictions or limitations
fields.help_text: Document any restrictions on use or capacity

fields.label: Overall Inspection Summary
fields.help_text: Summary of inspection findings and recommendations

rules.title: Equipment must be safe for operation

on_fail.defect_title: Equipment not safe for operation - tag OUT OF SERVICE
on_fail.defect_description: Equipment has failed frequent inspection and must be tagged OUT OF SERVICE until all defects are corrected and equipment is re-inspected.
